title: JustTimm's Vanilla Additions - Dark GUI Add-On
description: This pack makes all the vanilla and Vanilla Additions GUI's a dark mode.
body:
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/n0yOUBs.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro") [🖥️**Java**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions) | [🎮**Bedrock**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/justtimms-vanilla-additions-bedrock) | [⚙️**Mod Support**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-mod-support-add-on) | [🌙**Dark GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on) | [🍁**Autumn Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition) | [❄️**Winter Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition) | [🎅🏻**Xmas Add-On**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Vanilla Additions - Dark GUI Add-On is an additional pack for my original pack Vanilla Additions. This pack makes all the vanilla and Vanilla Additions GUI's a dark mode. Please only use this pack on top of my Vanilla Additions resource pack! You can find Vanilla Additions - Dark GUI Add-On on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on/)! Download the original [Vanilla Additions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions) here! ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[📰**Twitter**](https://twitter.com/JT_Additions) | [📸**Instagram**](https://www.instagram.com/justtimms_additions) | [💬**Discord**](https://discord.gg/runTSv2) | [📽️**YouTube**](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ?view_as=subscriber) | [📱**TikTok**](https://www.tiktok.com/@justtimms_additions) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Supported mods:
- 🍎[**Appleskin**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/appleskin) - 🚫[**No Chat Reports**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-chat-reports) - 📄[**Mod Menu**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) - 🦸[**Fabric Capes**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/capes) - ⌛[**ViaFabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabric) - 🌈[**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - 🧟[**Entity Texture Features**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/e5quQk0.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro") ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
You are **FREE** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. (Credit is appreciated) You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. Thanks in advance. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/bup8Qya.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions "Download Vanilla Additions") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/8KYWZp6.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition "Download Vanilla Additions - Autumn Edition") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/VCHp1x4.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition "Download Vanilla Additions - Winter Edition")
